title: Masterplast First Aid Kit Compact | 24 Pieces - Compact & Organised, Mini Emergency Kit, for Camping, Home, Office, Car, Travel - Plasters, Banages, Dressings, Medical Tape
features: FIRST AID KIT: The Masterplast First Aid Kit stays compact, so it slips into a drawer or glovebox easily. Keep it handy for home, office, car or camping, ready for small emergencies.
COMPACT: This 9cm x 12cm zip up First Aid Kit is the perfect size to take hiking, travelling or keep in your handbag for every day use.

ORGANISED: This compact kit includes 24 pieces, keeping essentials together. Perfect for keeping calm during little mishaps, whether it’s at work or on a weekend away. No hunting through cupboards for stray plasters or tape.

PLASTER SIZE VARIETY: Includes a handy mix of 8 large 76 x 19mm, 4 medium 55 x 19mm and 5 small 40 x 10mm plasters for the right fit fast. Ideal for grazes at home, paper cuts at the office, or little knocks while camping.
HYGIENIC: Includes 2 alcohol prep pads to clean skin before applying a dressing. Useful in the car, at the office, or when camping without easy access to soap.
CONVENIENT: Compact and equipped, this First Aid Kit is ideal for convience in minor emergencies, such as bumps, grazes, cuts, bruises or bites.
SAVES TIME WHEN IT MATTERS: No hunting through cupboards for stray plasters or tape. This organised 24 pieces kit lets someone sort a cut fast, then get straight back to work or play.
DRESSINGS: Tape and elastic gauze bandage help hold things in place when movement will. Ideal for school runs, gym sessions, dog walks, or a busy shift at work.
GRAB AND GO: The Masterplast First Aid Kit stays compact, so it slips into a drawer or glovebox easily. Keep it organised for home, office, car or camping, ready for small emergencies.
NSTRUCTIONS INCLUDED: An instruction leaflet is inside for quick, simple guidance in the moment. Reassuring for new carers at home or when stocking an organised workplace kit.
description: Product Description Masterplast First Aid Kit Busy days come with the odd scrape, and that’s exactly when the Masterplast First Aid Kit earns its place. This compact, organised kit keeps the essentials together, so there’s no rummaging through drawers in an emergency. With 24 pieces inside, it’s a neat little safety net for everyday life at home, in the office, in the car, or on trips like camping and weekends away. Inside this First Aid Kit are mixed plasters for small, medium and larger nicks, plus extra bits for more careful cover ups. The non-adherent pad is ideal when skin feels sore and needs gentle protection, while the gauze dressing and elastic gauze bandage add simple support for minor bumps and wraps. Alcohol prep pads help clean up before covering, and the tape helps keep dressings where they should be when life doesn’t slow down. An instruction leaflet is included too, for quick, clear guidance when it’s needed most. What’s included: 1 gauze dressing 5cm x 5cm, 1 non-adherent pad 5cm x 7.6cm, 8 large plasters 76 x 19mm, 4 medium plasters 55 x 19mm, 5 small plasters 40 x 10mm, 2 alcohol prep pads, 1 elastic gauze bandage 5cm x 1.8m, 1 tape, 1 instruction leaflet. Ingredients 0 Safety Warning For external use only. Box Contains 1 x Compact First Aid Kit See more
